gate_type: push-only retry of existing local commit + verification + gpt-handoff report
ready_for_slava_manual_retest_reason: push still rejected; commit a70071d remains local only; nothing deployed; no product/runtime change
scope_summary: Push-only retry of the existing, already-QA-cleared commit a70071d to origin/dev. No new commit, no edits, no force. Rejected again — the PAT lacks the `workflow` scope and the commit adds .github/workflows/azure-deploy-demo.yml. Origin unchanged.

push.remote_message: refusing to allow a Personal Access Token to create or update workflow .github/workflows/azure-deploy-demo.yml without workflow scope

diagnosis.credential_helper: manager-core (Git Credential Manager -> Windows Credential Manager)
diagnosis.implication: git's PAT lives in Windows Credential Manager, NOT gh; `gh auth refresh -s workflow` is not applicable. Fix the stored PAT's scope.

blocker.detail: The PAT in Windows Credential Manager lacks the `workflow` OAuth scope. The commit contains an Actions workflow file, so GitHub rejects the entire push. Not a content/secret problem.

operator_fix.classic_pat: GitHub > Developer settings > Tokens (classic) > the token > tick `workflow` > Update (same token, effective immediately)
operator_fix.new_or_finegrained: grant Workflows R/W, then clear cached cred (`cmdkey /delete:git:https://github.com`) so Credential Manager re-prompts for the new token

next_safe_step.name: AZURE_IAC_SKELETON_PUSH_RETRY_V0.1 (re-run)
next_safe_step.action: after token gains `workflow` scope: git push origin dev of the same commit a70071d; verify origin/dev==a70071d and origin/main unchanged
next_safe_step.alt: re-scoped commit gate dropping .github/workflows/azure-deploy-demo.yml, deferring it to AZURE_MINIMAL_DEPLOY_V0.1 (requires authorization)

blockers: github PAT (Windows Credential Manager) missing `workflow` scope blocks the push of the committed workflow file
limitations: local commit a70071d exists but is NOT on the remote
no rework needed once token scope is fixed
deploy-time inputs still deferred: insuranceApiImage (GHCR tag) + sqlAdminObjectId (Entra group oid)
Dockerfile + GHCR publish + OIDC federation remain AZURE_MINIMAL_DEPLOY_V0.1 deliverables
